summary: Excellent Charlie Miller soundboard capture of a fiery Paris show featuring the unique Truckin' → Bird Song → Never Trust A Woman sequence.
review: The recording, sourced from Charlie Miller’s soundboard, is crystal‑clear with smooth fades and a well‑balanced Hammond organ on “Never Trust A Woman.” The performance is described as focused, pop‑filled and one of the best shows of the European fall tour, highlighted by the rare Truckin’/Bird Song/Never Trust A Woman combination. Overall fans are enthusiastic about both the music and the tape quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both the musical performance (best of euro tour, unique set) and the soundboard recording (excellent mix, nice fades).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear Charlie Miller mix with smooth fades; organ on “Never Trust A Woman” stands out; overall very balanced and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Obscure but fire‑hot set list; unique sequencing (Truckin' into Bird Song into Never Trust A Woman) praised for its rarity and energy.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland's Hammond organ on “Never Trust A Woman” highlighted as a highlight.
